chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No. S- 251 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on CMA 749/24 3. For hearing of main case. 19.05.2025. None present for the petitioner, no intimation received. Same was position on the last three consecutive dates of hearing which shows that petitioner and his counsel have lost their interest to proceed with the matter hence the instant petitioner is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Irfan/PS
